name: Lobster Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lobster shells (or a little more)
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the lobster shells and place them in a 375°F oven.
Heat for 30 minutes.
2. Transfer the cooked shells to a pot. Add fish stock (or clam juice)
and vinegar, then cover and cook over medium heat for another 30
minutes.
3. Remove the shells and reduce the liquid until it is reduced to about
1/3 cup.
4. Pour the remaining liquid into a bowl and chill completely.
5. Add the egg yolk to the chilled liquid, whisking continuously.
6. Slowly beat in the salad oil until well combined.
Makes 2 Cups
